optional: id>=1 AND optional: id<=132419 AND optional: id IN BF(keyword_id)

extra_info.Dynamic Filters: optional: movie_id>=290 AND optional: movie_id<=2525726 AND optional: movie_id IN BF(movie_id)

query_name:
EXPLAIN (ANALYSE, FORMAT JSON)
/*JOB-26B*/SELECT MIN(chn.name) AS character_name,
       MIN(mi_idx.info) AS rating,
       MIN(t.title) AS complete_hero_movie
FROM job.complete_cast AS cc,
     job.comp_cast_type AS cct1,
     job.comp_cast_type AS cct2,
     job.char_name AS chn,
     job.cast_info AS ci,
     job.info_type AS it2,
     job.keyword AS k,
     job.kind_type AS kt,
     job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx,
     job.movie_keyword AS mk,
     job.name AS n,
     job.title AS t
WHERE cct1.kind = 'cast'
  AND cct2.kind LIKE '%complete%'
  AND chn.name IS NOT NULL
  AND (chn.name LIKE '%man%'
       OR chn.name LIKE '%Man%')
  AND it2.info = 'rating'
  AND k.keyword IN ('superhero',
                    'marvel-comics',
                    'based-on-comic',
                    'fight')
  AND kt.kind = 'movie'
  AND mi_idx.info > '8.0'
  AND t.production_year > 2005
  AND kt.id = t.kind_id
  AND t.id = mk.movie_id
  AND t.id = ci.movie_id
  AND t.id = cc.movie_id
  AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id
  AND mk.movie_id = ci.movie_id
  AND mk.movie_id = cc.movie_id
  AND mk.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id
  AND ci.movie_id = cc.movie_id
  AND ci.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id
  AND cc.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id
  AND chn.id = ci.person_role_id
  AND n.id = ci.person_id
  AND k.id = mk.keyword_id
  AND cct1.id = cc.subject_id
  AND cct2.id = cc.status_id
  AND it2.id = mi_idx.info_type_id;
